ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the sensor that captured the reading */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Unix timestamp when the reading was taken */,
  "angle" INTEGER /* Angle of the sensor in degrees */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate of the sensor's position */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate of the sensor's position */,
  "tilt" REAL /* Tilt of the sensor in degrees */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded by the sensor */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level recorded by the sensor */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure recorded by the sensor */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index recorded by the sensor */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "is_tilt" REAL /* Indicates if the tilt is adjusted */,
  "is_tilt_temperature" REAL /* Temperature when tilt is adjusted */,
  "is_temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded under adjusted conditions */,
  "data_validation_status" TEXT /* Indicates the data validation status (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Indicates the calibration status (e.g., calibrated, needs calibration) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Indicates the alert status (e.g., no alert, alert triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, air quality) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is deployed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery used in the sensor */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "alert_thresholds" TEXT /* Threshold values for triggering alerts (e.g., temperature, humidity, pressure) */,
  "data_retention_period" INTEGER /* Data retention period in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)
